content: give me an HTML about how great cats are !
I'll have the team build a fun, self-contained HTML page celebrating cats with some nice styling and cat facts!

The requested project is a single-page static website that celebrates cats. It will display a visually appealing layout with cat facts and custom styling, all contained in one HTML file with no external dependencies. The page will use semantic HTML and embedded CSS to create a clean, responsive design.

type: static

- index.html - Main page containing the cat celebration layout, facts, and embedded CSS styling.

@Coder the plan is ready.
